name: Advisory (Safe)
description: Water level is within safe range. The area is currently under normal monitoring. No immediate action is required. Please stay informed through HydroGuard 180 updates.

name: Monitoring
description: Water level is rising and is now under monitoring status. Residents are advised to stay alert and prepare essential items in case conditions worsen.
action: Stay alert and prepare essential items

name: Warning
description: Flood warning issued. Water level has reached a critical threshold. Residents should prepare for possible evacuation and move important belongings to higher areas.
protocols: Alert all residents via SMS/social media

name: Danger
description: CRITICAL ALERT: Dangerous water level detected. Flooding may occur or is already happening. Evacuate immediately to the nearest safe or designated evacuation area.
protocols: Coordinate with police and fire department
